ffn_silu_contiguous_test.note: removed silu().contiguous() (model.py:704, marked TODO) on decode path

gate: >=3% e2e decode OR >72 kernels removed, local, output-preserving, no new kernel
verdict: REFUTED: removing the FFN silu().contiguous() removes 36 kernels/token (1/layer) but 0% tok/s (the silu materialization is ~0.1% GPU) -- below the gate on both counts (36<72 kernels, 0%<3%). Reverted (the .contiguous() may be load-bearing in prefill/batched/other-model paths not tested). RMSNorm 2.2% + residual 2.8% are each below 3% and the scheduler already fuses adjacent elementwise (SwiGLU 0.1%); no classic small-op fusion clears the gate.
decision: do not implement; classic small-op fusion not worth a dedicated arc
